error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: TheHive 5 node requires application/json header
symptom: When trying to create a case from an alert using TheHive 5 node, n8n returns a 'Bad request' error indicating missing headers.
applies_when: Creating a case from an alert
not_this_if: The request is successful with other nodes
root_cause: TheHive 5 API requires the Content-Type header to be set to application/json for certain requests. If this header is not included, the API will reject the request with a 'Bad request' error.
fix_steps: Check if there is an option to set the Content-Type header
If not available, use an HTTP Request node instead
Manually set the Content-Type header to application/json in the HTTP Request node
agent_instruction: Ensure the Content-Type header is set to application/json when making requests to TheHive 5 API.
